---
title: "2026-07-16"
---

## PCA result hierarchy fixed

Spatially balanced PCA retains PC1--PC5 as one descriptive set. PC1 is the robust global mode; PC2--PC3 are recurring contrasts that can exchange rank; PC4--PC5 are recurring but partly mixed secondary subspace. All five receive the same loading, score-map, and score-pole inspection. Result prominence follows explained variance and LOCO alignment, rather than being pre-assigned by component number.

> 空间平衡 PCA 保留 PC1–PC5 为同一描述集合。PC1 为稳健全球模态；PC2–PC3 可重复但可交换排序；PC4–PC5 为可重复但部分混合的次级子空间。五者均做同一套检查；呈现层级由方差与 LOCO 决定，不由编号预设。

## Frozen progressive deepening route

1. **PCA--kinematics bridge.** At the same equal-area-cell scale, compare PC1--PC5 scores with raw annual long-term warming, the distribution and temporal change of trailing-10-year Sen warming speed, and warming/cooling endpoint prevalence. The central test is whether PC2--PC5 still distinguish timing structures among cells with comparable total long-term warming.
2. **Five-PC result cards.** For every PC, record explained variance, loading contrast, score-pole raw/STL composites, spatial organisation, LOCO correspondence, and bridge result. PC4--PC5 are not omitted; weaker evidence only changes their placement.
3. **Continuous mode-composition test.** Test whether low PC1 energy or high effective-mode count co-occurs with stronger local warming-speed heterogeneity. This remains a descriptive association between representations.
4. **Constrained association stage.** Only after steps 1--3, construct geography-only and then ERA5-augmented spatially blocked models. Continuous PC scores or a documented PC4--PC5 subspace are responses; results identify associations, not causal drivers.
5. **Seasonal/ice module.** Retain it as modular supplementary/prose evidence. Do not use it to force a PCA explanation or reopen a glacier-meltwater attribution claim.

> 逐步深化路线：先做 PCA 与 raw kinematics 的同尺度桥接；再为五个 PC 形成统一结果卡；随后检验连续模态组成是否对应更强的速度异质性；最后才开展空间分块的 geography/ERA5 关联。季节与冰期保持为独立补充模块，不强行解释 PCA。

## Decision gate

The bridge advances into the main result only if it shows a non-trivial temporal distinction at comparable total warming. A simple PC1--warming correlation is expected but insufficient. No new time-series algorithm, categorical partition, teleconnection narrative, or causal attribution method is added while this route is evaluated.

> 进入主结果的门槛：在总增温相近时，仍能观察到非平凡的时间结构差异。仅有 PC1 与总增温相关不足以构成深化。评估期间不新增时间序列算法、分类方法、遥相关叙事或因果归因。

## First bridge diagnostic

The first equal-area-cell bridge meets the decision gate for PC2 and PC3. PC2 has near-zero alignment with total long-term warming (Spearman rho -0.056) but positive warming-speed-change alignment in every total-warming quintile (0.37--0.51). PC3 likewise has near-zero total-warming alignment (-0.077) but negative warming-speed-change alignment in every quintile (-0.40 to -0.25). PC4 is predominantly negative but less uniform; PC5 has no consistent speed-change signal. These are descriptive spatial associations only.

> 第一轮格网桥接中，PC2、PC3 已满足门槛：二者与总增温几乎无关，却在全部总增温分位中分别稳定正／负对应增温速度变化。PC4 主要为负但较弱；PC5 暂无稳定信号。以上均仅为空间描述关联。

Continuous mode composition also links to speed heterogeneity rather than speed-change direction: PC1 relative energy has rho -0.327 with trailing-10-year speed variability, while secondary relative energy and effective mode count have 0.327 and 0.252. Thus cells represented by several modes have less temporally steady local rates, without a uniform acceleration/deceleration tendency.

> 连续模态组成同样对应速度异质性，而不对应速度变化方向：PC1 相对能量与 10 年速度变异度 rho=-0.327；次级能量与有效模态数分别为 0.327、0.252。多个模态混合表达的格网，其局部速度更不均一，但不统一加速或减速。

## Restricted ERA5 association diagnostic

The current exploratory association uses 573 equal-area PCA cells, continuous geography/lake-background predictors, and only wind-speed plus precipitation ERA5 summaries. Across three contiguous spatial-block scales, available ERA5 improves PC1 held-out $R^2$ by about 0.07--0.09, but reduces held-out performance for PC2 and PC3. Thus current ERA5 inputs provide no predictive association for the two clearest secondary timing contrasts. This is a constrained negative result, not evidence against climatic control or a causal attribution.

> 现有受限 ERA5 诊断使用 573 个等面积 PCA 格网、连续地理/湖泊背景，以及仅风速和降水汇总。三种连续空间 block 尺度下，ERA5 对 PC1 留出 $R^2$ 增加约 0.07–0.09，却降低 PC2、PC3 的留出表现。因此当前输入对两个最清晰次级时间对比无预测关联；这是受限负结果，不反证气候调制，更不是因果归因。

## PC2--PC3 timing-morphology diagnostic

Because PC2 and PC3 can exchange rank under LOCO, the fixed component labels are not the target of the next diagnostic. A rotation inside their joint cell-score plane was aligned to raw trailing-10-year warming-speed change. At the 72 × 21 reference grid its direction is `0.595 PC2 - 0.804 PC3` and explains 20.4% of cross-cell speed-change variance. A separately defined 2011--2020 minus 1990--1999 local-speed contrast gives a near-identical direction (cosine 0.951). The primary direction has grid cosines 0.964 and 0.995 at 36 × 11 and 144 × 42; 45 spatial hold-out blocks yield a minimum training-direction cosine of 0.992 and median test-block Spearman alignment of 0.503.

> PC2、PC3 可在 LOCO 中交换排序，故诊断对象改为其共同 score 平面内的旋转。该旋转按 raw 10 年滑动速度变化对齐：72×21 格网方向为 `0.595 PC2 - 0.804 PC3`，解释 20.4% 格网间速度变化方差。独立定义的 2011–2020 减 1990–1999 局部速度对比几乎同向（余弦 0.951）。粗／细格网余弦为 0.964／0.995；45 个空间留出 block 中训练方向最低余弦 0.992，测试 block 内 Spearman 对齐中位数 0.503。

The axis is not invariant to spatial composition: leaving out Europe or North America reduces its LOCO cosine to 0.842 or 0.800, coinciding with the weakest PC2--PC3 subspace congruence. The frozen wording is therefore a reproducible, spatially organised, composition-sensitive warming-speed timing continuum, rather than two fixed physical PCs or a mechanism claim.

> 该轴并非不受空间组成影响：去欧洲／北美时 LOCO 余弦降至 0.842／0.800，且恰是 PC2–PC3 子空间最弱的情形。因此固定表述为：可重复、具有空间组织、但受样本组成影响的增温速度时序连续谱；不称为两种固定物理 PC，也不作机制主张。
